Package Project.Parts

package Project.Parts
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    Element
    Represents an XML-like element node with attributes, children and text.
    FinderOfElem
    Utility class to find an element by its resolved id within a tree.
    IdMaker
    Utility for generating the next unique resolved id for an element tree.
    SaveStorage
    Concrete FileManager that delegates load/save to XmlLoader.
    XmlLoader
    Responsible for serializing and deserializing Element trees to/from XML text.
    XmlParser
    Lightweight XML parser that converts textual XML into Element objects.
